hub.abc_desc.tr: Record antecedent, আচরণ, এবং consequence পর্যবেক্ষণ

hub.bcbahandoff_desc.tr: ডেটা dashboard জন্য BCBAs + printable handoff packet জন্য consultation

hub.biascheck_desc.tr: Gently surfaces প্যাটার্ন মধ্যে আপনার ডেটা জন্য reflection on potential implicit bias — growth, not guilt

hub.casestudy_desc.tr: AI-generated করুন case studies সাথে 4-phase clinical reasoning এবং scoring

hub.commlog_desc.tr: Two-way family contact tracker সাথে follow-ups — ensure না family falls মাধ্যমে cracks

hub.condprob_desc.tr: Foreground vs background probability বিশ্লেষণ এর validate ABC hypotheses সাথে ডেটা

hub.counseling_desc.tr: এআই role-চালান সাথে শিক্ষার্থী personas জন্য counseling practice

hub.familyvoice_desc.tr: Structured form জন্য families এর share পর্যবেক্ষণ, cultural insights, এবং celebrations — সাথে এআই translation

hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: ফাংশন Communication Training planning সাথে modality selection

hub.homelog_desc.tr: Simplified অভিভাবক-friendly আচরণ logging সাথে everyday ভাষা

hub.iepprep_desc.tr: AI-generated করুন meeting preparation packet সাথে ডেটা সারাংশ, talking পয়েন্ট, এবং পরবর্তী steps

hub.latency_desc.tr: Stimulus-কে-প্রতিক্রিয়া সময় measurement সাথে mean, median, এবং range statistics

hub.maintenance_desc.tr: Track skill retention post-mastery এবং generalization across সেটিং, people, এবং উপকরণ

hub.mtss_desc.tr: দৃশ্যমান 3-tier pyramid জন্য managing multi-tiered supports সাথে AI-powered tier placement recommendations

hub.nlabc_desc.tr: ধরন বা পেস্ট পর্যবেক্ষণ নোট মধ্যে everyday English — এআই structures them এ ABC entries automatically

hub.obscoach_desc.en: Real-time coaching on your data collection quality — identifies gaps, suggests improvements, and rates your data
hub.obscoach_desc.tr: Real-time coaching on আপনার ডেটা collection quality — identifies gaps, suggests improvements, এবং rates আপনার ডেটা

hub.pdpath_desc.en: Guided onboarding modules for building ABA skills step-by-step
hub.pdpath_desc.tr: Guided onboarding modules জন্য building ABA skills step-by-step

hub.qualitycheck_desc.en: AI-powered review of your ABC entries with specific improvement suggestions
hub.qualitycheck_desc.tr: AI-powered পর্যালোচনা এর আপনার ABC entries সাথে নির্দিষ্ট improvement suggestions

hub.quick_launch_hint.en: Core clinical tools — one tap access
hub.quick_launch_hint.tr: Core clinical সরঞ্জাম — one ট্যাপ access

hub.reinforcement_desc.en: Structured motivation survey — identify what drives each student across 6 categories
hub.reinforcement_desc.tr: Structured motivation survey — চিহ্নিত what drives each শিক্ষার্থী across 6 categories

hub.relmap_desc.tr: দৃশ্যমান diagram এর শিক্ষার্থী connections — trusted adults, peers, family, mentors — সাথে gap বিশ্লেষণ

hub.restorative_desc.tr: Step-by-step scripts জন্য harm repair, community circles, এবং reintegration conferences

hub.sandbox_desc.tr: লোড করুন simulated শিক্ষার্থী ডেটা জন্য PD, pre-service training, বা শেখা ABA ছাড়া real শিক্ষার্থী

hub.selfcheck_desc.en: Student-facing mood check-in and reflection journal — capturing their voice
hub.selfcheck_desc.tr: student-facing mood চেক-মধ্যে এবং reflection journal — capturing their কণ্ঠস্বর

hub.taskanalysis_desc.tr: Break skills এ teachable steps সাথে সামনে, backward, বা মোট-task chaining এবং prompt ট্র্যাকিং

hub.treatintegrity_desc.en: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
hub.treatintegrity_desc.tr: Document whether interventions হয় implemented as designed — component-স্তর fidelity ট্র্যাকিং

hub.trends_desc.en: SVG charts showing intensity trends, setting frequency, and day/time heatmap
hub.trends_desc.tr: SVG charts দেখান intensity trends, সেটিং frequency, এবং দিন/সময় heatmap

hub.cantdowontdo_desc.en: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc.tr: Sort skill vs. performance deficits এর pick ডান support.

hub.competingpathways_desc.en: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.
hub.competingpathways_desc.tr: Map desired এবং replacement আচরণ against problem path.

hub.functionquiz_desc.en: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
hub.functionquiz_desc.tr: Practice identifying আচরণ ফাংশন থেকে short scenarios.

hub.practicum_desc.en: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
hub.practicum_desc.tr: চালান এক guided practice case থেকে শুরু এর শেষ করুন.

overview.empty_desc.en: Start collecting ABC data or run live observations to see trends here.
overview.empty_desc.tr: শুরু collecting ABC ডেটা বা চালান লাইভ পর্যবেক্ষণ এর see trends here.

hotspot.tap_hint.en: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
hotspot.tap_hint.tr: ট্যাপ এক cell এর increment. ক্লিক routine নাম এর সম্পাদনা.

quick_fill_hint.en: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
quick_fill_hint.tr: এআই will parse আপনার বিবরণ এ fields below. আপনি can তারপর সম্পাদনা manually.

quiz_fba_purpose.en: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
quiz_fba_purpose.tr: What হয় primary purpose এর এক FBA?

quick_fill_placeholder.en: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
quick_fill_placeholder.tr: যেমন "শিক্ষার্থী threw paper সময় গণিত when asked এর দেখান কাজ, শিক্ষক redirected calmly"

reinforce_step_1.en: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_1.tr: শুরু সাথে dense reinforcement (যেমন, FR-1 বা FR-2)

reinforce_step_2.en: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_2.tr: Once আচরণ হয় consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2

reinforce_step_3.en: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_3.tr: সরান এর variable schedule (VR) জন্য more natural maintenance

fidelity_tip_2.tr: Provide যোগ additional BST (আচরণ Skills Training)

record_tip_1.en: Include what happened before, during, and after the behavior
record_tip_1.tr: include what happened আগে, সময়, এবং পরে আচরণ

ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.en: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.tr: এক break? সাহায্য? Someone এর শুনুন? Space?

ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.en: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.tr: যোগ করুন এক দল নোট... (Shift+Enter জন্য নতুন line)

ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.en: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.tr: যোগ করুন context, constraints, বা নির্দিষ্ট challenges... যেমন, "শিক্ষার্থী also has এক speech delay" বা "এই হয় এক middle school শিক্ষার্থী"

ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.en: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.tr: Any অন্য details (was child tired, hungry, ইত্যাদি)...

ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.en: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.tr: Describe scenario আপনি চান এর practice সঙ্গে...

ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.en: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.tr: Describe শিক্ষার্থী persona... যেমন, "আপনি হয় এক 3rd grader who becomes anxious সময় গণিত এবং tends এর cry এবং shut down..."

ph.eg_handwashing_tying_shoes_morning_ro.en: e.g. Handwashing, Tying Shoes, Morning Routine
ph.eg_handwashing_tying_shoes_morning_ro.tr: যেমন Handwashing, Tying Shoes, Morning Routine

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: যেমন "শিক্ষার্থী সাথে autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "নতুন এর school"

ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.en: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.tr: Enter আচরণ লক্ষ্য এর scale (যেমন, "শিক্ষার্থী will remain মধ্যে seat সময় independent কাজ জন্য 15 মিনিট")

ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.en:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.tr:
Reflect on আপনার approach...
• What worked well?
• What would আপনি do differently?
• What strategies do আপনি চান এর practice পরবর্তী?

ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.en: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.tr: Share what আপনি notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, বা suggestions জন্য school দল...

ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu.en: 🎯 Target behavior (what you want to reduce)
ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu.tr: 🎯 Target আচরণ (what আপনি চান এর reduce)

ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.en: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.tr: ধরন আপনার প্রতিক্রিয়া here. Be thorough এবং ব্যবহার professional ভাষা...

ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.en: What could you or a grown-up do differently?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.tr: What could আপনি বা এক grown-up do differently?

ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma.en: What environmental change will you make?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma.tr: What environmental পরিবর্তন will আপনি তৈরি করুন?

ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.en: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.tr: What made আপনি feel এই way? (বিকল্প)

ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.en: What was going on before you felt this way?
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.tr: What was going on আগে আপনি felt এই way?

toast.all_entries_already_synced_to_abc_.tr: All entries already synced এর ABC ডেটা
